claims.found: L238 'async def deserialize'; L251 if message["event"]=="media"; L256 await ulaw_to_pcm(...); L263 InputAudioRawFrame; L267 elif event=="dtmf"; L271 InputDTMFFrame(KeypadEntry(digit))

claims.found: L129 'async def serialize'; the AudioRawFrame envelope is L152-170: pcm_to_ulaw, base64.b64encode, answer={'event':'media','streamSid':self._stream_sid,'media':{'payload':payload}}. Line 129 is the method entry point of the cited function.

claims.found: L255 comment 'Forward as a mark so the Twilio side can correlate events'; L264-270 serverSocket.send(JSON.stringify({event:'mark', streamSid, mark:{name:...}}))

claims.claim: Cloudflare converts agent MP3 TTS to mulaw at index.ts:12
claims.found: L12 "Encoding VoiceAgent's MP3 TTS output -> mulaw 8kHz base64 for Twilio" (note: outbound conversion code L284-295 actually treats agent audio as 16kHz PCM and warns MP3 cannot be decoded on Workers; the MP3 framing is from the header comment as cited)
L129 is '// --- Twilio protocol types ---' (a section comment). The TwilioMediaMessage envelope is at L148, which the note body cites correctly.

claims.claim: Deepgram: 'Each session is identified by a unique call or stream identifier, which must be preserved on all inbound and outbound media to avoid cross-call contamination' (ebook 709-711)
claims.found: L709-711: 'Each session is identified by a unique call or stream identifier, which must be preserved on all inbound and outbound media to avoid cross-call contamination.' Exact match.

claims.claim: DTMF handled 'outside the speech pipeline so they do not pollute transcripts' (ebook 755)
claims.found: L754-755: 'DTMF tones should be detected explicitly and handled outside the speech pipeline so they do not pollute transcripts.' Exact match at L755.

claims.claim: Mechanism: without clear, already-sent-but-unplayed audio keeps playing after interrupt (clear flushes Twilio outbound media buffer)
claims.found: Code emits {event:'clear', streamSid} on InterruptionFrame; clear is Twilio's documented Media Streams message to empty the buffered outbound audio. Deepgram ebook L737-740 corroborates barge-in must stop/mute outbound audio immediately. Mechanism consistent with code + protocol.

summary: All technical assertions verified against ground truth. Pipecat twilio.py code_refs (129/238/149/142) accurately describe the JSON envelope, ulaw deserialize/serialize, clear barge-in, and REST auto-hangup. Cloudflare index.ts body citations (148 envelope, 255-266 marks, 12 MP3->mulaw) check out. Both Deepgram quotes (cross-call contamination L709-711, DTMF out-of-band L755) are exact. Only nit: the frontmatter code_ref index.ts:129 points to a section-divider comment rather than the TwilioMediaMessage interface at L148 (which the body cites correctly) -- MISCITED, not WRONG.
